freefall.ic_note: Initial conditions are E=1 radial infall (vt=1/f, vr=-sqrt(rs/r0)), not a particle released from local rest at r0.

orbital.ic_note: Driver logs E and L at t=0 only; CSV records norm but not E/L drift columns.

null_geodesic.dt_sweep_ic_note: main_benchmark.cpp dt sweep reuses (vr, vph) from the last subcritical capture launch (b = b_crit - 1e-4) and overwrites null_b_<b0>.csv where b0 = L/E is recomputed after the null condition (typically ~b_crit + 3e-6).

source_findings.freefall_ic: Initial conditions are E=1 radial infall (vt=1/f, vr=-sqrt(rs/r0)), not a particle released from local rest at r0.
source_findings.orbital_el_drift_untracked: Driver logs E and L at t=0 only; CSV records norm but not E/L drift columns.
source_findings.null_projection: Null post-step projection resets U^t only (every 1000 steps); vr and vph are untouched.
source_findings.null_dt_sweep_ic: main_benchmark.cpp dt sweep reuses (vr, vph) from the last subcritical capture launch (b = b_crit - 1e-4) and overwrites null_b_<b0>.csv where b0 = L/E is recomputed after the null condition (typically ~b_crit + 3e-6).
source_findings.escape_termination: Escape is detected in benchmark console/CSV post-processing (r>1000, vr>0), not via TerminationPolicy.
source_findings.horizon_stiffness: Schwarzschild coordinates become singular at r=r_s; freefall/orbital terminate at r<=r_s, null at r<=1.0001*r_s. RK4 steps can overshoot before termination check.
source_findings.csv_filename_stability: null_geodesic.cpp names files via std::to_string(b0) (default 6 decimal places). Near-critical runs can share filenames; the dt sweep overwrites the same CSV multiple times, so only the final 1M-step trace persists for that b0.
header_doc_mismatches: freefall.h claims 'from rest at r0' but implementation uses E=1 infall (vt=1/f, vr=-sqrt(rs/r0)).
orbital.h says output is geodesic.csv; driver writes orbital.csv.
null_geodesic.h says output is null_geodesic.csv; driver writes null_b_<b>.csv.
